title: Supply Chain Manager - IRCTC Logistics - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - IRCTC Logistics - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the IRCTC Logistics family as a Supply Chain Manager in Gurgaon. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About IRCTC Logistics:
IRCTC Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IRCTC Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
